title: AN ACT to amend Tennessee Code Annotated, Title 4, Chapter 3, Part 5; Title 9; Title 60; Title 67 and Title 68, relative to the "Climate Resiliency Fund Act."
summary: As introduced, enacts the "Climate Resiliency Fund Act." - Amends TCA Title 4, Chapter 3, Part 5; Title 9; Title 60; Title 67 and Title 68.

actions.action: P2C, ref. to Agriculture & Natural Resources Committee- Government Operations for Review
Assigned to s/c Agriculture & Natural Resources Subcommittee
Placed on s/c cal Agriculture & Natural Resources Subcommittee for 2/26/2025
Failed for lack of motion in: Agriculture & Natural Resources Subcommittee
